title: corydalis lutea
intro: Corydalis lutea, also known as yellow corydalis, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and delicate foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Corydalis lutea has been found to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep, and aiding in the treatment of anxiety and depression. It is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
